diagnosis.final_diagnosis: type 3 von Willebrand disease with von Willebrand factor alloantibodies
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on the presence of anti-VWF antibodies detected by ELISA, ineffective haemostasis after surgical procedure, lower than expected VWF recoveries, and a frameshift mutation (c.2435delC, p.Pro812ArgfsTer31) in the VWF gene. The patient's history of excessive bleeding and previous treatments with VWF/FVIII concentrates also supported the diagnosis.
